author: irene
body: Good news! Perhaps Figueroa was a misstep for ya… But the video of them singing it on youtube was the song to convince me to stay up and hear more ^\_^

author: Wendy
body:
I actually love “Figueroa”.

The “Lost River” album came in the mail the other day, also got a signed postcard from I think Lisa in the package, that was such a sweet gesture – impressed me too.
